$description: shadcn/ui parity REFERENCE SET for the #2024 conformance harness — WE-owned data, not harness code. The canonical component set (button/input/card) and the shadcn roles each is themed by, each naming the resolved DTCG path the flavor (we:design-systems/shadcn.tokens.json) authors that role onto. The harness (fui:plugs/webtheme/conformanceHarness.ts scoreFlavor) diffs each role against what the tokens+intents model can land on a rendered component and emits a per-component compliance score + gap list. Seeded from the #2022 gap taxonomy. This file carries ZERO harness logic — swapping it (or the material one) is what proves the harness target-agnostic (#2024 acceptance 2).
